changelog: Unified the brand wordmark across the entire app — same 'hush' (white) + 'tv.' (cyan) recipe used in the cinematic splash screen now drives the Android launcher icon (all densities, legacy + adaptive), the Leanback TV banner, and both the expanded and collapsed states of the TV side rail. The wordmark is rendered into a single drawable resource (ic_hushtv_logo.png) so every surface is pixel-identical and scales responsively from 48 dp collapsed-rail through 192 dp xxxhdpi launcher to 1280 × 720 TV banner with no hand-tuned per-context code.
